author: Sarah Chen, Lead Architect
executive_summary: This proposal outlines a comprehensive plan to modernise Greenfield Enterprises' customer portal, replacing the legacy PHP application with a modern React/Next.js frontend and Node.js microservices backend. The project aims to improve page load times by 60%, enable mobile responsiveness, and integrate with the existing SAP ERP system. The estimated timeline is 20 weeks with a total budget of $285,000.
problem_statement:
The current customer portal was built in 2014 using PHP 5.6 and jQuery. It suffers from several critical issues:

• Average page load time of 8.2 seconds (industry benchmark: < 2 seconds)
• No mobile responsiveness — 45% of customers access via mobile devices
• Manual data synchronisation with SAP requiring 6 hours of daily staff effort
• Security vulnerabilities identified in the last penetration test (12 critical findings)
• Customer satisfaction score dropped from 4.2 to 3.1 over the past 18 months
proposed_solution:
We propose a three-tier modernisation approach:

1. Frontend: React/Next.js application with server-side rendering for SEO and performance. Tailwind CSS for responsive design across all device sizes.

2. Backend: Node.js microservices deployed on AWS ECS with auto-scaling. Real-time SAP integration via RFC/BAPI connectors, eliminating manual synchronisation.

3. Infrastructure: AWS cloud-native stack with CloudFront CDN, RDS PostgreSQL, ElastiCache Redis, and comprehensive monitoring via DataDog.
deliverables:
Fully responsive customer portal (desktop, tablet, mobile)
Real-time SAP ERP integration layer
Customer self-service dashboard with order tracking
Admin panel for content management
Comprehensive API documentation
Automated CI/CD pipeline
12-month post-launch support plan
terms_and_next_steps:
1. Upon acceptance, a 30% deposit ($85,500) is required to begin the Discovery phase.
2. Progress payments of 30% at Design completion and 30% at Development completion.
3. Final 10% upon successful deployment and UAT sign-off.
4. All deliverables include 12 months of warranty support.
5. Change requests after Design phase approval are subject to additional scoping and pricing.

To proceed, please sign and return this proposal by April 18, 2026. We will schedule a kick-off meeting within 5 business days of acceptance.
